description_long: This object is a stylized graveyard cross, crafted to resemble a wooden cross with a rough, organic texture and irregular, hand-carved appearance. The cross is wrapped with dark, vine-like elements that crisscross its surface, adding a sense of age and neglect. The wood grain is visible, with a dark brown coloration and subtle highlights that suggest weathering. The base is a faceted, black, stone-like pedestal, providing stability and contrast to the wooden cross above. The overall form is slightly asymmetrical, enhancing its rustic and somber character. There are no visible inscriptions or engravings on the cross.
description: A rustic wooden graveyard cross wrapped in dark vines, mounted on a black stone base. The cross has a weathered, hand-carved look with no visible inscriptions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cross shape, vine details, and the faceted black base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the cross and the depth of the base, with vines visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the cross arms and vine wrapping, with the base visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the cross's profile and the continuation of the vine details.
